title: rubus callistylus
intro: Rubus callistylus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry vine, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, characterized by its edible fruits and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus callistylus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its use in treating digestive issues and fever. Rubus callistylus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
